# Proactive Property Management (PPM)

> Residential property management for landlords and investors across Northern & Central New Jersey.
> Full-service, NJ-compliant, one flat management fee based on rent collected. Founded 2023.
> Phone: (973) 330-8261 · Email: contact@njppm.com · Based in Jersey City, NJ.
> Equal Housing Opportunity — we support the Fair Housing Act and the NJ Law Against Discrimination.

## Services
- [Property management services](https://www.njpropertymanager.com/services/): tenant placement, rent collection, maintenance coordination, financial reporting, lease management, NJ compliance.
- [Pricing](https://www.njpropertymanager.com/pricing/): one management fee (8–12% of rent collected), no setup/technology/admin fees, no maintenance markups; one-time leasing fee when a new tenant is placed.
- [Free rental analysis / contact](https://www.njpropertymanager.com/contact/): what your NJ rental should rent for, no obligation.

## Service areas (city pages)
- [All service areas](https://www.njpropertymanager.com/service-areas/)
- Jersey City, Hoboken, Newark, Bayonne (Hudson/Essex) · Hackensack (Bergen) · Morristown, Parsippany (Morris) · Edison, Woodbridge (Middlesex).

## NJ landlord guides
- [New Jersey Landlord-Tenant Law (complete guide)](https://www.njpropertymanager.com/blog/nj-landlord-law/)
- [Rent Control in New Jersey](https://www.njpropertymanager.com/blog/nj-landlord-law/rent-control-nj/) · [NJ rent control lookup by municipality](https://www.njpropertymanager.com/rent-control-lookup/)
- [NJ Security Deposit Rules](https://www.njpropertymanager.com/blog/nj-landlord-law/security-deposit-rules/) · [Eviction Process in NJ](https://www.njpropertymanager.com/blog/nj-landlord-law/eviction-process-nj/)
- [NJ Landlord Obligations](https://www.njpropertymanager.com/blog/nj-landlord-law/landlord-obligations/) · [NJ Landlord Disclosures](https://www.njpropertymanager.com/blog/nj-landlord-law/nj-landlord-disclosures/)
- [Property Management Costs & Fees in NJ](https://www.njpropertymanager.com/blog/property-management-costs/) · [Is hiring a property manager worth it?](https://www.njpropertymanager.com/blog/property-management-costs/is-it-worth-it/)
- [NJ Landlord Compliance Checklist](https://www.njpropertymanager.com/landlord-checklist/)

## Notes
- Guides are informational, not legal advice; verify current rules with the municipality or a qualified attorney.
